title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zomato - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zomato - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Zomato in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
